client.registered_address: Level 7, RMZ Ecospace, Outer Ring Road, Bellandur, Bangalore 560103

matter_summary: Trademark protection of the 'LUMEN HEALTH' wordmark and logo across Class 9 (cardiac monitoring software and bedside hardware) and Class 42 (SaaS, cloud-based analytics services) — comprehensive search, clearance opinion, and TM-A filing.

phases.name: Phase I: Comprehensive Search & Clearance Opinion
phases.scope_summary: Pre-filing comprehensive trademark search across the IP India database covering Class 9 and Class 42 for both the wordmark and logo, followed by a written clearance opinion identifying any conflicting marks and recommended filing strategy.
scope_bullets: Comprehensive search of the IP India trademark register for identical and deceptively similar marks across Class 9 and Class 42
Phonetic, visual, and conceptual similarity analysis for the 'LUMEN HEALTH' wordmark and logo
Written clearance opinion with recommended filing strategy and identified risks
outcome_bullets: Clear go / no-go signal before filing fees are committed
Documented basis for filing strategy in case of future opposition

phases.name: Phase II: TM-A Filing — Wordmark and Logo, Class 9 & Class 42
phases.scope_summary: TM-A filing for the 'LUMEN HEALTH' wordmark and logo across Class 9 and Class 42, with monitoring of the application through to examination report.
scope_bullets: Drafting and filing of TM-A applications: wordmark and logo, Class 9 and Class 42 (4 filings total)
Filing the day after sign-off on the search results
Monitoring of the application docket and acknowledgement of receipt of the application number
Ongoing tracking through examination (typical 6-8 month wait for examination report)
outcome_bullets: Application number(s) within five working days of engagement
Trademark applications on file across Class 9 and Class 42 for both marks

payment_terms: 50% advance to commence work; balance on delivery (filing receipts).
out_of_pocket_note: Government filing fees of INR 4,500 per class per mark (4,500 × 2 marks × 2 classes = INR 18,000) are payable directly to the IP India office and are excluded from the legal fee. Applicable taxes are also charged at actuals.
deferred_or_separate: Response to examination objections, if any, will be quoted separately at the time (indicative range INR 8,000–12,000 per response depending on complexity).
